creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
I upgraded the port to the newest version, but that requires some deep changes in many ports.
I just asked some maintainers to approve some commits, after I got them, I will commit many updates, this new port will be included:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab/-/commit/ecd365343ccd003cef671f5259bccd1f83d4eca1
